user.title: Add Chatterbox TTS Service
user.description: Set up Chatterbox TTS integration to create TTS agents. API key is optional for local servers.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Chatterbox TTS
reconfigure.description: Update API credentials for this integration.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Chatterbox TTS
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for {title} is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Chatterbox TTS server. Check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.already_configured: A connection to this server already exists.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check your API key and try again.
error.duplicate_api_key: An entry with this API key already exists.

user.title: Add TTS Agent
user.description: Create a new TTS agent with custom voice and generation settings.

reconfigure.title: Update TTS Agent
reconfigure.description: Modify voice and generation settings for this TTS agent.

error.already_exists: A profile with this name already exists
